title: The Melting Pot — the app suite for teachers in performing arts
description: Animated opening slide revealing The Melting Pot logo — the app suite for teachers in performing arts.

title: A living home for creative teaching
description: Title slide introducing Creative Curriculum Designer as a long-term home for drama, dance and music — across every key stage from EYFS to KS5.

title: The problem: arts teachers are working alone
description: Why drama, dance and music teachers — and the non-specialists supporting them — are losing creative practice today.

title: Why now: the arts in higher education are at a tipping point
description: The case for the arts — university course closures, falling GCSE entries, the pipeline that feeds the creative industries.

title: Protecting the pipeline — from EYFS to the conservatoire stage
description: One continuous arc from a Reception assembly to a university stage, and why every stage of the journey depends on the last.

title: The solution: one living home
description: Half-term planner, lesson library, and activity stacks in one workspace — purpose-built for performing arts education across every key stage from EYFS to KS5.

title: Who it's for: arts educators across every key stage
description: Audience overview spanning Early Years & Primary, Secondary & Sixth Form (EYFS to KS5), and the arts sector partners contributing alongside them.

title: Promo: Your creativity is your craft
description: Animated scene celebrating the creative work teachers pour into every lesson.

title: Promo: Never lose a great lesson again
description: Animated scene on capturing great lessons so they are never lost.

title: Drama, Music & Dance — one workspace
description: Subject coverage breakdown with example units for each performing-arts discipline.

title: Promo: Designed for creative teaching
description: Animated scene on tools shaped around creative classroom practice.

title: Feature: Lesson planner calendar
description: Weekly timetable view with drag-and-drop lesson slots across drama, music and dance.

title: Promo: Curriculum mapping made visual
description: Animated scene on mapping curriculum coverage visually across terms.

title: Promo: Sequencing that makes sense
description: Animated scene on coherent lesson sequencing across a term.

title: Promo: Progression you can see
description: Animated scene showing skills progression across year groups.

title: Feature: Lesson library
description: Searchable, taggable library of drama, music and dance lessons.

title: Feature: Activity stacks
description: Reusable groups of warm-ups, mains, and plenaries for drama and music.

title: Feature: Activity cards with web links
description: Activity cards carry video, music, backing, vocal and web-link resources for one-tap access in the classroom.

title: Feature: Activity creation flow
description: The new-activity form, with dedicated fields for video, web link, backing track and resources.

title: Promo: AI that supports, never replaces
description: Animated scene on AI assistance that amplifies teacher judgement.

title: Promo: Adaptive teaching built in
description: Animated scene on adapting activities for every learner.

title: Promo: SEND support at the core
description: Animated scene on inclusive planning for SEND learners.

title: Promo: Stretch and challenge
description: Animated scene on extending high-attaining learners.

title: Promo: Cross-curricular connections
description: Animated scene linking the arts across the wider curriculum.

title: Promo: Reflect and refine
description: Animated scene on reflecting after lessons and improving over time.

title: Promo: Inspiration on tap
description: Animated scene on discovering fresh activity ideas.

title: Feature: Print-ready lesson PDFs
description: Sample lesson PDF export with school header, learning objective, and activity sequence.

title: Promo: Works wherever you teach
description: Animated scene showing mobile and tablet use around school.

title: Feature: Settings
description: Settings panel showing year groups, categories, branding, and data tabs.

title: Feature: School homepages & preview mode
description: Public school landing pages and the one-click read-only preview experience.

title: Promo: A community of creative educators
description: Animated scene on sharing practice across a community of arts teachers.

title: How it works
description: The four-step flow from empty term to ready-to-teach.

title: A melting pot of knowledge
description: Schools, universities, arts organisations, practitioners and communities pouring their best into one living archive for children.

title: Partner activity packs & marketplace
description: Arts-sector partners — Royal Opera House, National Theatre and more — contributing activity packs through a partner marketplace.

title: Celebrating learning in the arts
description: Surfacing the daily craft of arts teaching — to parents, leaders, partner organisations and the wider sector.

title: Inspiring, life-changing arts education
description: Why one teacher, one moment, one lesson can change a life — and why CCD is built so those lessons multiply.

title: Promo: The future of creative teaching
description: Animated closing scene looking to the future of creative education.

title: Grow your creative practice — together
description: Closing call to action inviting schools, departments and arts organisations to join the creative ecosystem.
